auth_stale_detail: The app will attempt to reconnect to the server once the connection is restored
offline_boot_title: AsterDrive cannot reach the server right now
offline_boot_description: This launch could not restore a valid session and the backend is temporarily unreachable. The app shell is up, but it has to wait here until the network or service comes back.
offline_boot_hint: If you have logged in before, refresh again after the service recovers to resume normal use.
